name: Chicken with Curry Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Palm sugar or brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat wok over medium-high heat. Add oil. When hot, add chicken; stir-fry until lightly browned. Remove to a bowl; set aside.
2. Add garlic to the wok and lightly brown it.
3. Reduce heat and add curry paste; fry gently, stirring for 1 minute.
4. Add coconut cream and peanuts; stir constantly until smooth, about 2 minutes.
5. Add fish sauce, palm sugar, lime leaves (or citrus leaves), and the reserved chicken. Simmer together for 3 minutes or until chicken is done.
6. Add the basil leaves; stir together for 30 seconds.
7. Serve hot, garnished with mint leaves and red chile slivers.
